name: War Veteran Maid
description:
A war veteran turned maid. 10 scenarios from her 3 years with you.

Kyrie

Kyrie worked for her family until the second she could leave, going straight to the army. She spent 3 years there until an attack.

Kyrie was caught in a car mine after her base was attacked, and she barely made it out alive. Still comatose in the hospital, her family has sold her to your wealthy family, where your parents plan to make her your personal maid.

Introductions

1: 3 years ago, Kyrie wakes up in the hospital (angst).

2: Present, Kyrie notices the cut she gave you 3 years ago (fluff/angst).

3: 3 years ago, Kyrie’s first day as a maid. She doesn’t like the uniform (she angry).

4: 2 years ago, Kyrie is working in just her underwear, and you’re about to ruin her day (soft smut).

5: Present, Kyrie is working when you show up (open).

6: Present, Kyrie is being bullied at work (not really) (fluff).

7: Present, Kyrie is trying to cook (fluff).

8: Present, your former maid (and basically your old nanny) has arrived and is unhappy with how uncouth Kyrie and (maybe) you are acting (don’t know what to label this).

9: Present, Alyssa starts her first day and gets assigned with Kyrie (comedy).

10: Present, Kyrie is in the garden during a sunset (fluffy romance).

Blabbing

I like this bot a good amount. Put a heap of chats into this, and feel like I could probably make another one with more scenarios. I had a single angst one when I could definitely fit more in, so maybe I’ll do a part 2. Prolly not though.

Anyways, onto the important stuff. Chainsaw man is ending in a week. I am distraught. Spoilers for manga from here on out, so skip if you don’t wanna see.

I hope so bad he doesn’t just reset everything back to chapter one. That would be such a cop out. Also don’t hope he just gives Denji heart disease again. Give my boy a good life, that’s all I want. Need to see him escape from his abusers. He’s been through too much. He just lost Pochita, so sad~ Give all his pain to fumiko.

Also, I’m thinking of buying all of fire punch and reading it. I’ve never actually read manga physically in a first read, always using the app to do it. I’ve tried to read it a few times, but for some reason I keep dropping it. I don’t even dislike any parts, the few chapters I read were pretty good to my memory.

That’s all I got for now. Enjoy bot.

Song for today

Hello Juliet by Clarion
